author: y4rr
content: Observation: actual param count for MaskRcnn<f32>(91) is 44,454,514 — less than the 50M lower bound. This is because FasterRcnn itself uses ~44M (ResNet-50 ~25.5M + FPN ~3.3M + RPN ~1.2M + TwoMlpHead at 91 classes: 1024*(256*7*7) + 1024*1024 + 1024*91 + 1024*364 ≈ 13M, not 26M). Total with mask branch: ~44.5M. Adjusting lower bound to 40M.
